audience: Real Estate brands and product teams
prompt: Build a premium real estate website inspired by PropertyNest - Real Estate Solutions. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.

Find Your Perfect Property

Access thousands of premium properties with advanced search filters, virtual tours, and expert guidance. Your dream home is just one click away.

Our Services

Comprehensive real estate solutions tailored for buyers and investors

Property Search

Advanced filters to find exactly what you're looking for with AI-powered recommendations.

Virtual Tours

Explore properties from anywhere with 360-degree virtual tours and live streaming options.

Expert Guidance

Mortgage Calculator

Calculate payments, explore financing options, and understand your investment potential.

Verification

All properties verified for authenticity, legal status, and complete documentation.

24/7 Support

Round-the-clock customer support to answer all your questions and concerns.
